metadata.description: Grok as a peer implementer for Claude Code: default integration=direct lands live-tree edits for one-shot code (no consent gate; ACP peer always external worktree; stop-time apply); auto/review are opt-in worktrees; ACP is the default peer channel (runMode direct is a separate installed-home security posture). Review, reason, verify, continue-run, and verified handoff included. See plugin/references/integration-modes.md. Not affiliated with xAI.
